## Problem / motivation

<!-- What are you trying to do that AutoTriage doesn't support today? What's the
     pain? "As a <role>, I want <capability> so that <benefit>." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? Be concrete: a new scanner adapter, a new action
     tool, a config option, an eval metric, etc. -->

## Area

- [ ] Scanner adapter (new tool / normalization)
- [ ] Triage agent (prompt, backend, guardrail)
- [ ] Action layer (tickets, PRs, owners, escalation)
- [ ] Eval harness / metrics
- [ ] CLI / configuration
- [ ] CI / deployment / ops
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short. -->

## Additional context
